title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.410 - License required, application, fee
text:
265.410.  License required, application, fee. — 1.  A license shall be required for each commercial plant which slaughters livestock or poultry, processes meat or meat products for human consumption, or keeps meat or meat products in a cold storage warehouse.  Before any license is issued or renewed an inspection shall be made to determine that the plant has complied with sections 265.300 to 265.470.
  2.  Applications for the license shall be made on forms furnished by the director.  The license fee shall be ten dollars for one year, and the license may be renewed.
(L. 1967 p. 371 § 11)
